Zakat Amount
Scholars differ on Zakat for investment stocks. One view: Zakat on full market value. Another: only on distributed dividends. Consult a scholar for guidance.
—
Total Cost
—
Total Kilograms
≈ 3
≈ 3 Kg per Person
Zakat al-Fitr is obligatory on every Muslim. Amount: one Sa' (≈ 3 Kg) of the local staple food. Some scholars permit paying it in cash.
⚠️ This calculator is for guidance only. Consult a scholar for rulings specific to your situation
📅 Zakat is due after one full Hijri year of possessing the Nisab
🏠 No Zakat on personal residence, car, and household items

📖 How to Use

Select the type of Zakat from the tabs above and enter the required data — results appear instantly. For the comprehensive calculator, enter all your financial assets and the current gold price to calculate your total Zakat.
